expectations: update production on the local runtime
verify health and representative data output
commit the repo so the fork is versioned

epics.title: Dashboard rendering resilience and visual truthfulness

epics.title: Macro card data hygiene and display safety

efforts.title: Eliminate invalid macro display values such as NaN/NaNT and replace them with safe operator-facing placeholders
Differentiate unavailable, stale, failed, and not-configured macro inputs in card rendering so blanks are interpretable
Add regression coverage for macro card formatting and degraded-data rendering in dashboard and compact briefing surfaces

epics.title: LLM state coherence and operator messaging

efforts.title: Unify operator-visible LLM status language across analysis, leverageable ideas, and review surfaces so off, fallback, configured, and parse-failed states do not contradict each other
Expose a compact runtime explanation surface for why deterministic fallback is active and whether a configured LLM path actually participated
Add end-to-end validation for operator-facing LLM status combinations across configured, disabled, fallback, and failure modes

epics.title: Operator review queue usability

efforts.title: Convert cluster-review quality telemetry into a bounded actionable operator queue instead of metrics-only visibility
Prioritize review items by region pressure, near-duplicate suspicion, and repeated low-confidence patterns so the queue is triage-friendly
Surface review queue state clearly in dashboard and API responses, including empty-queue semantics that explain why metrics may still be elevated

epics.title: LLM operator-state contract hardening

efforts.title: Centralize a normalized operator-facing LLM state enum and explanation block in API payloads so dashboard and briefing surfaces consume one shared contract
Separate per-surface LLM supportability from participation so configured, static-by-design, not-invoked, and unavailable states do not collapse into one operator label
Add a booted-server validation matrix for dashboard and API operator-state combinations under controlled runtime scenarios

epics.title: Operator review queue direct actions

efforts.title: Add first-class operator queue actions such as ack, snooze, and jump-to-artifact links so the review queue becomes directly actionable

epics.title: Realistic queue fixtures and prioritization validation

efforts.title: Capture sampled high-pressure queue fixtures or snapshots from real runs so prioritization tuning can be validated against realistic operator cases

epics.title: Agent-managed source intelligence foundation

efforts.title: Define a canonical source registry schema that supports active, candidate, shadow, rejected, and deprecated lifecycle states plus agent-review provenance

Build a file-based source-ops workspace contract so OpenClaw subagents can read role/task packets and write structured discovery, grading, overlap, and pruning outputs without touching production admission directly
Expose an operator-facing source inventory and source-ops needs surface showing lifecycle state, review status, promotion readiness, and current runtime coverage gaps

Add explicit source-registry metadata for expected multi-publisher runtime buckets so attribution diagnostics can classify aggregators like GDELT from data contract rather than a hard-coded heuristic list

epics.title: Bounded subagent discovery and grading workflow

efforts.title: Create bounded OpenClaw subagent role definitions and task templates for source discovery, validation, grading, overlap analysis, pruning review, and onboarding preparation
Implement a structured source scorecard and explainable grading rubric so subagent-produced candidate evaluations are comparable and operator-reviewable
Add overlap and uniqueness evaluation so candidate sources are judged on incremental corroboration value, duplication risk, and likely LLM utility rather than existence alone

epics.title: Shadow-mode source evaluation and promotion gates

efforts.title: Add shadow-state handling so candidate sources can be observed and scored before they influence production operator output
Define policy-driven lifecycle transitions that can auto-advance candidates through pre-production stages up to shadow while requiring human approval before active promotion
Record pruning recommendations for noisy, redundant, expensive, or maintenance-heavy sources without auto-removing active production sources
Add a lifecycle policy evaluator that consumes candidate records plus scorecard and overlap artifacts and emits the exact next allowed transition or blocking reason
Add a shared source-ops action taxonomy so result envelopes, pruning assessments, and policy evaluators use one canonical set of recommendation labels
Add evaluator support for batch candidate queues so source-ops can compute next allowed transitions and blockers for multiple candidate records at once

epics.title: Source-role-aware fusion and performance measurement

efforts.title: Classify sources by fusion role such as anchor, corroborator, anomaly detector, context, and exploratory so runtime evidence handling stops treating all feeds alike
Feed source-role and source-quality metadata into LLM clustering and analysis paths so weak evidence is not treated like anchor evidence and better source mixes improve downstream reasoning
Measure per-source contribution, overlap, noise, and operator impact so source additions can be validated against cluster quality, review pressure, tipping-point quality, and trust outcomes
Add endpoint-level contract coverage for reasoning metadata on `/api/analysis` and `/api/brief/news` so source-role context cannot silently drop from live operator surfaces

Add direct per-cluster source provenance or cluster-to-runtime-source attribution so source contribution scoring stops relying on feed-type proxies like RSS to GDELT and can measure downstream quality impact more truthfully

epics.title: Operator settings and configuration control plane

efforts.title: Create a dedicated settings surface that centralizes layout preferences, source selection, LLM provider/model controls, agent-analysis behavior, refresh cadence, and debug exposure into one operator-facing control plane
Define a versioned Crucix runtime configuration contract with schema validation, sane defaults, effective-config reporting, and boot-time drift checks across file, env, and live runtime state
Persist operator settings safely so dashboard layout, source toggles, LLM mode, and agent-analysis preferences survive restarts and can be exported or restored
Add role-separated admin controls and local-safe access boundaries so sensitive settings, debug surfaces, and runtime controls are not mixed with read-only operator views

epics.title: Dashboard layout overhaul and operator workspace UX

efforts.title: Replace the current brittle panel placement with a responsive layout system that properly fits the newer content windows and supports narrow, desktop, and wallboard display modes
Add panel resizing, collapsing, pinning, and priority ordering so high-value windows stay usable without manual DOM surgery when the dashboard grows
Create saved workspace presets such as operator, diagnostics, source-ops, and executive briefing layouts with quick switching between them
Separate live operator views, diagnostics, and administration into clearer information architecture so the dashboard stops mixing operations with debug clutter

epics.title: Runtime control, restart safety, and sweep reliability

efforts.title: Add a dev-safe restart helper with PID or port ownership sanity checks so local validation cycles stop binding to stale `3117` listeners and can prove which instance is live
Detect, classify, and recover stuck sweep or synthesis jobs so `/api/health` does not remain indefinitely in `sweepInProgress` when LLM paths hang or fail to complete cleanly
Expose runtime process controls and last-success state so operators can see current sweep stage, last good refresh, active PID identity, and bounded restart or stop actions
Add timeout, cancellation, retry, and completion telemetry for deferred LLM and synthesis work so slow, hung, and failed jobs are operationally distinguishable

Add bounded retention or time-decay for noise-suppression history so one-off duplicate bursts and retired sources do not accumulate indefinite suggestion weight or unbounded state growth across repeated sweeps

Surface noise-suppression history decay and prune telemetry in health and review diagnostics so operators can see when stale suggestion weight has aged out, how many retained history entries remain, and whether pruning is actively keeping state bounded

Add rolling per-sweep noise-suppression telemetry snapshots and a lightweight diagnostics trend view so operators can distinguish one-off aged-out or prune activity from sustained state-growth pressure over time

Add a sustained-pressure alert or queue threshold for noise-suppression telemetry so repeated retained-entry growth or consecutive prune-active sweeps can escalate from diagnostics-only visibility into an operator action cue
Add operator acknowledge or snooze controls plus recent audit visibility for sustained noise-suppression pressure alerts so teams can distinguish accepted load from unattended telemetry churn

epics.title: Source operations console and lifecycle controls

efforts.title: Build an operator-facing source management console for source enable-disable controls, category filtering, role grouping, and per-source selection without editing raw files
Add source lifecycle actions for candidate, shadow, active, quarantine, and prune recommendations with visible policy blockers and human-approval boundaries
Expose source health history, freshness thresholds, failure-class trends, and one-click quarantine or suppression controls for noisy or broken sources
Turn source performance measurement into an operator workflow surface with attribution explanations, confidence caveats, and validation views tied to cluster quality and trust outcomes

Add historical source-performance trend snapshots and delta views so operators can compare attribution, cluster quality, and trust-outcome shifts across sweeps instead of only inspecting the current snapshot

epics.title: LLM and agent operations console

efforts.title: Create an LLM operations page that exposes provider health, active model, fallback chain, forced heuristic or forced LLM modes, and recent failure reasons
Expose prompt-debug, parse-failure, and reasoning-surface validation details for clustering and analysis paths without requiring direct file inspection
Add agent-analysis tuning controls for tipping-point thresholds, publish policy, deterministic fallback mode, and horizon behavior so output can be tuned without code edits
Add operator-visible cost, latency, and completion telemetry for LLM-backed clustering and analysis so expensive or degraded paths can be diagnosed quickly
Extend phase telemetry and recovery classification to deferred ideas enrichment so watchdog and `/api/health` can distinguish post-publish idea-generation hangs from analysis refinement hangs

Add an active LLM provider readiness probe plus last-success and last-failure heartbeat so `/llm-ops` health reflects live reachability and model readiness rather than only configuration-derived posture

Add provider-specific cheap readiness checks and richer failure classification for LLM probes so heartbeat validation can distinguish network failure, auth failure, rate limiting, and missing-model states without always using a synthetic completion

epics.title: Operator review workflow, diagnostics, and reasoning repair

efforts.title: Turn review queues and low-confidence diagnostics into direct operator workflows with acknowledge, snooze, suppress, promote, and quarantine actions plus audit trail capture
Add cluster repair helpers that explain why a cluster is weak and support bounded merge, split, placement-correction, and suppression actions
Expose attribution uncertainty and alias-collision diagnostics so inferred runtime-source mappings, duplicate publisher aliases, and double-count risks are visible to operators
Add noise-suppression controls for duplicate bursts, repetitive low-value events, and source-specific suppression rules that can be reviewed and tuned from the UI
Add a shared navigation and page-shell component for dashboard-adjacent operator, diagnostics, admin, and LLM operations surfaces so labels, links, and boundary explanations do not drift

Distinguish expected multi-publisher runtime buckets from true alias-collision anomalies in attribution diagnostics, so broad aggregators like `GDELT` do not over-report routine publisher diversity as operator-actionable alias risk
Persist rolling noise-suppression match history and per-rule hit counters so duplicate-burst, low-value, and source-rule suggestions reflect multi-sweep behavior instead of only the current snapshot

Surface source-registry runtime-bucket metadata and registry-vs-observed attribution drift in the source-ops console so operators can review when a source declared single-publisher starts behaving like an aggregator or when new aggregator aliases should be added to the contract

Persist runtime-bucket drift history and delta trends across sweeps so operators can distinguish one-off alias anomalies from sustained contract drift before editing source-registry aliases or promoting a source to expected multi-publisher

epics.title: Deployment hardening, persistence, and external operations

efforts.title: Add startup and deployment hardening with environment validation, secret sanity checks, graceful shutdown, and process-manager-friendly health semantics
Persist runtime history for source health, review pressure, LLM failures, and performance trends in a proper local datastore instead of only transient in-memory surfaces
Add configurable alert routing and escalation for stale sweeps, source failures, elevated review pressure, and degraded inference paths
Support config and state export-import plus operator audit history so deployments can be backed up, restored, or reviewed without manual file archaeology
Add source-control audit history and undo metadata for suppress and quarantine actions so local-admin mutations are attributable, reviewable, and safely reversible during incident triage
Provide checked example launchd or systemd service definitions plus restart-policy guidance so Epic 33 hardening is easier to operationalize across real hosts

Add a small admin diagnostics surface or export endpoint for the SQLite runtime-history store, including table sizes, last-write timestamps, and a bounded integrity check, so datastore health is visible without shell access

epics.title: Contract validation and payload integrity expansion

efforts.title: Add schema-level validation helpers for source-ops artifacts so example task packets, scorecards, overlap assessments, pruning outputs, lifecycle envelopes, and related artifacts are checked against their JSON schemas instead of only spot-checking fields in tests
Expand contract tests for UI-facing and operator-facing payloads so dashboard, health, analysis, brief, settings, and admin surfaces cannot silently drift
Add effective-runtime payload validation and served-page smoke checks so HTML-backed dashboard surfaces are validated as delivered, not just as source files

Add endpoint-level regression coverage for settings-driven agent-analysis publish behavior so horizon filtering, tipping-point thresholds, and deterministic-fallback suppression are validated against live `/api/analysis` output rather than only settings contracts
Add end-to-end regression coverage for `POST /api/review-workflow/action` and `GET /api/review-workflow/audit`, including action-specific payload validation and audit-entry assertions

Add endpoint-level regression coverage for cluster-repair workflow actions and suppressed-cluster state on `/api/brief/news/review` and `/api/data`, so bounded repair recommendations and persisted decisions do not drift from the live contracts

Add browser-level regression coverage for the shared operator surface shell so active-nav state, boundary copy, and admin action availability are validated after client-side render instead of only by static HTML fetches

epics.title: Critical event alerting, corroboration, and proactive operator notification

efforts.title: Define a critical-event taxonomy and policy contract for fast alert classes such as government-site violence, aviation incidents, radiation anomalies, and major chokepoint disruptions, including per-class severity and corroboration thresholds

Build an urgent candidate queue that ingests tripwire signals from low-trust and medium-trust feeds, holds them in monitoring state, and retries corroboration on a short cadence before promotion or discard

Add alert-state promotion rules and confidence labels such as preliminary, corroborated, and official-confirmation, with explicit evidence summaries explaining why a candidate crossed the paging threshold
Expose proactive alert routing for narrowly scoped critical events so Crucix can send immediate vetted operator notifications with freshness, confidence, corroboration basis, and unresolved caveats

epics.title: Settings safety, preset lifecycle, map-event surfacing, and dashboard performance hardening

efforts.title: Add revision or ETag-style concurrency tokens to the operator settings store and write API so stale listeners, conflicting saves, and restore drift are detected instead of silently last-write-wins
Add an explicit local admin nonce or CSRF-style confirmation token for `/api/settings/operator` and `/api/settings/import` so browser-originated local writes are not relying on network locality alone

Add panel-level render budget telemetry and optional virtualization for wallboard mode so long OSINT and news streams plus large review queues do not silently degrade browser responsiveness as the dashboard grows

Add saved panel-layout reset plus named operator presets so per-panel collapse, pin, priority, and size controls can recover from bad workspace states and switch intentionally between analyst, narrow-screen, and wallboard profiles
Add operator-editable preset authoring plus clone, reset, and import-export controls so workspace presets stop being code-defined bundles and can be tuned safely from the UI

Investigate and harden missing map surfacing for high-salience breaking open-source events, starting with the White House Correspondents' Dinner Secret Service shooting signature, including source carriage, ingestion, clustering, geocoding, and map-placement behavior

epics.title: Local runtime restart verification and deploy-proofing

efforts.title: Make local `restart-safe` prove PID rotation or report failure explicitly so contract deploy checks do not falsely succeed against a still-serving stale runtime

epics.title: SDR corroboration workflow and RF-side analyst prompts

epics.title: Critical event delivery integrity and queue accountability

efforts.title: Harden critical-event candidate classification beyond regex heuristics by incorporating richer source and topic metadata into queue class detection
Persist retained audit history for critical-event queue transitions so operators can inspect when candidates moved between monitoring, corroborated, official-confirmation, and discarded states
Add delivery outcome audit and resend state for critical-event notifications before any automatic outbound send loop is enabled

epics.title: SDR receiver session automation and retained RF evidence

efforts.title: Add bounded SDR session automation, capture artifacts, and retained RF-side evidence summaries so corroboration can advance from receiver selection into operator-reviewable observation support

efforts.title: Expose retained restart-safe outcome history and PID-rotation proof in operator-visible runtime diagnostics

efforts.title: Centralize restart-audit polling and completion messaging in the shared ops shell so admin and diagnostics runtime feedback stop drifting

epics.title: Dashboard map proportional sizing

efforts.title: Clamp map panel height by layout mode so the dashboard map stays proportionate to the visible window instead of expanding taller than the viewport

epics.title: Dashboard map sizing tokens

efforts.title: Move map height clamps into explicit layout tokens so dashboard vertical budget tuning stops depending on scattered inline CSS math

epics.title: Dashboard layout budget diagnostics

efforts.title: Expose live dashboard layout-budget diagnostics so viewport-driven map, topbar, and lower-grid sizing can be checked from measured DOM state instead of only by visual inspection

epics.title: Dashboard layout efficiency tuning

efforts.title: Analyze live dashboard space waste and tune desktop column balance, topbar density, and lower-panel placement so operator surfaces use screen real estate more efficiently without collapsing graceful degradation

epics.title: Dashboard layout regression contracts

efforts.title: Add browser-level regression coverage for dashboard layout-budget diagnostics so measured map and panel ratios fail fast when a layout change lets the dashboard freelance again

epics.title: Preset-aware dashboard density tuning

efforts.title: Add preset-specific density tuning and possibly alternate topbar/control placement so operator, diagnostics, and executive modes can optimize for different screen budgets without one global layout compromise

epics.title: Shared runtime action feedback contracts

efforts.title: Generalize shared runtime-action feedback helpers beyond restart-safe so stop or future bounded actions can report queued, completed, and failed states consistently

epics.title: Critical event operator observability and workflow surfaces

efforts.title: Expose critical-event classifier match basis and ambiguity flags for operator review
Expose critical-event queue transition audit on operator-facing diagnostics surfaces
Expose critical-event delivery audit and resend posture on operator-facing diagnostics surfaces

epics.title: SDR session operator workflow surfaces

efforts.title: Expose SDR session plans, observation capture, and evidence-review workflow on operator-facing surfaces

epics.title: Settings conflict recovery UX

efforts.title: Add clearer admin-surface stale-write recovery UX for settings concurrency conflicts so operators can reload or reconcile after a bounded 409 instead of only seeing a raw failure string

epics.title: Extended local admin write-auth boundaries

efforts.title: Extend local admin write-auth nonce coverage to additional debug-side mutation endpoints so source controls, review workflow source actions, and runtime control can be evaluated under the same local write boundary

epics.title: Restart-safe helper portability hardening

efforts.title: Harden restart-safe helper portability when lsof is unavailable so local runtime rotation can fall back cleanly instead of failing on host packaging gaps

epics.title: Dashboard persistence honesty and feedback

efforts.title: Restore bounded persistence for dashboard-side panel, map, and workspace controls after the local-admin nonce rollout so operator tweaks do not silently fail across reloads

Add explicit dashboard-side save-status feedback for preset and panel-layout actions so operators can tell when a layout action only applied locally versus durably persisted through the supported write boundary

epics.title: Admin preset browser regression coverage

efforts.title: Add browser-level regression coverage for admin preset clone, import, and delete flows so the operator-editable preset authoring path stays honest when future UI work touches the local control plane

epics.title: Telegram and RSS cluster corroboration hardening

efforts.title: Add bounded corroboration and de-duplication between urgent Telegram map candidates and matching RSS/GDELT stories so high-salience OSINT incidents land on the map quickly without permanently inflating single-source weak-cluster pressure

epics.title: Headless layout-budget measurement thresholds

efforts.title: Add true headless-browser layout-budget measurements and threshold assertions so future regressions can verify computed topbar, map, and overflow ratios directly instead of relying only on served-page contract coverage

epics.title: Admin preset presentation controls

efforts.title: Extend local admin preset authoring so custom presets can explicitly edit densityMode and topbarMode instead of inheriting only built-in presentation defaults

backlog.title: Add clearer admin-surface stale-write recovery UX for settings concurrency conflicts
backlog.reason: Settings writes now fail safely on stale revision tokens, but the admin surface still only reports the conflict text. A follow-on slice should surface current-vs-stale revision detail and offer a bounded reload or diff-friendly recovery path.

backlog.title: Extend local admin write-auth nonce coverage to other debug-side mutation endpoints
backlog.reason: This cycle hardened `/api/settings/operator` and `/api/settings/import`, but other local-only mutation endpoints like source controls, workflow source actions, and runtime control still rely on locality plus route gating. A follow-on slice should decide which of those need the same nonce boundary for consistency.

backlog.title: Harden restart-safe helper portability when `lsof` is unavailable
backlog.reason: Local runtime rollout exposed a real packaging gap: `restart-safe` failed with `spawn lsof ENOENT`, so helper verification should degrade gracefully or use a portable fallback instead of hard-failing on hosts without `lsof` in PATH.
